message:
fix: address clippy warnings in test files

- Use is_empty() instead of len() > 0 in proptest_wal_engine
- Use Duration::from_secs(1) instead of from_millis(1000) in proptest_wait
- Use sort_by_key instead of sort_by in recorder_correctness_integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
